title: geranium microrhizon
intro: Geranium microrhizon, also known as geranium, is a species of flowering plant that belongs to the genus Geranium, and is native to South Africa. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, antibacterial, and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of geranium microrhizon include reducing stress and anxiety, improving circulation, and promoting skin health. Herbal preparations of geranium microrhizon include essential oils, teas, and tinctures, which can be used topically or internally to reap its health benefits.
